The '''X-26 StarHaul''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] developed by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] and utilized most by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

A Starhaul was 55 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long. It required a crew of two, plus a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. A Starhaul had space for 5,000 metric tons of cargo and a single week's worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]].

In atmosphere, this vessel could only achieve 200 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per hour. It also was equipped with a Class 4 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].

Though unshielded, the craft was armed with one double laser cannon turret.
